column5: Rounded to subrounded COBBLES and fine to coarse GRAVEL and CONCRETE. No recovery assumed, finer material washed out. (FILL)

Moderately strong, brownish grey, spotted yellow, moderately decomposed, medium grained GRANITE with closely to extremely closely spaced, moderately narrow to narrow, rough undulating, limonite and manganese stained joints, dipping 15 degrees to 35 degrees and occasional subvertical.

Strong to moderately strong, pinkish grey, spotted black and white, slightly to moderately decomposed, medium grained GRANITE with closely to medium spaced, very narrow to extremely narrow, rough undulating, limonite stained joints, dipping 5 degrees to 10 degrees.
